name: Recurrent Depth: 2-Pass Train + 4-Pass Eval with Error Feedback
blurb: Depth recurrence with contractive hidden states (ResidualScale + Jacobian proxy) and quantization error feedback. Train 2-pass core (layers 4-6), eval 4-pass with TTT (freeze=0). Solves PR #363's quantization error amplification via learned error correction. Built on PR #414 stack + PR #399 Parallel Muon.
author: abaybektursun
